title: jalcophila peruviana
intro: Jalcophila peruviana, also known as Peruvian chamomile or small chamomile, is a flowering plant native to the Andean regions of Peru and Ecuador. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jalcophila peruviana include promoting relaxation, reducing anxiety and insomnia, and alleviating digestive issues such as nausea and stomach cramps. Herbal preparations of Jalcophila peruviana often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to soothe skin irritations.
